_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 deep night. 6 domain-projections: robotics, particle physics, artificial intelligence, cell biology, immunology, number theory. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
robotics_through_tig: Robotics is operator-physical embodiment of computation; sensors actuate world, controllers BREATH between.
Actuator is operator-converter from energy to motion; motor servomotor pneumatic hydraulic each have distinct profiles.
Sensor is operator-input from world; cameras lidar IMU encoders each provide partial LATTICE.
Kinematic chain is operator-LATTICE of joints and links; degrees of freedom determine reachable workspace.
Inverse kinematics is operator-COUNTER from end-effector goal to joint angles; multiple solutions in redundant LATTICE.
Control system runs the BREATH; software reads sensors, decides action, commands actuator at high rate.
Perception interprets sensor data; PROGRESS from raw signal through filtering segmentation classification to scene LATTICE.
Planning is operator-search through future states; configuration space LATTICE with collision-free path to goal.
Manipulation is operator-control of environment via end-effector contact; grasp planning force feedback compliant control.
Locomotion is operator-PROGRESS through space; wheels legs treads aerial aquatic each have distinct dynamics.
Autonomy is operator-self-direction; closed-loop sense-plan-act without external command source.
particle_physics_through_tig: Standard model is operator-LATTICE of fundamental particles and forces; SU(3) x SU(2) x U(1) gauge structure.
Fermion is operator-half-integer-spin matter; quarks leptons obey Pauli exclusion (no two in same state).
Boson is operator-integer-spin force-carrier; photon W Z gluons mediate fundamental interactions.
Quark is operator-fractional-charge particle; six flavors (up down charm strange top bottom) confined in hadrons.
Lepton is operator-whole-charge fundamental particle; electron muon tau plus three neutrinos.
Higgs boson is operator-mass-giving field excitation; couples to W Z and fermions giving rest mass.
Gauge symmetry is operator-LATTICE local invariance; demanding it generates the gauge fields automatically (Yang-Mills).
Electroweak interaction unifies operator-electromagnetic and weak forces; SU(2) x U(1) breaks via Higgs to U(1)_em.
Strong force is operator-QCD; gluons couple to color charge confining quarks in colorless hadrons.
Neutrino is operator-near-massless fermion; produced in beta decay weak processes, oscillates between flavors.
ai_through_tig: AI is operator-engineered intelligence; computation that perceives reasons learns acts.
Search is operator-PROGRESS through state space; BFS DFS A-star navigate tree of possibilities to goal.
Knowledge representation encodes facts in operator-LATTICE; logic frames semantic networks ontologies allow inference.
Machine learning fits operator-functions from data; supervised unsupervised reinforcement each map distinct flavors.
Planning generates operator-action sequences toward goals; STRIPS PDDL hierarchical task networks.
Natural language processing parses operator-text; tokenization parsing semantic role labeling generation.
Computer vision reads operator-pixels into objects; convolution feature extraction segmentation classification.
Reasoning chains operator-inferences; symbolic logic plus probabilistic Bayesian plus neural pattern composition.
Neural network is biological-inspired LATTICE of weighted units; gradient descent fits weights to training distribution.
Reinforcement learning learns operator-policy from reward; agent explores environment to maximize cumulative HARMONY.
cell_biology_through_tig: Cell biology is operator-study of cellular structure and function; microscopy plus molecular techniques on the LATTICE-unit of life.
Cell membrane is operator-boundary lipid bilayer; selectively permeable LATTICE controlling what enters and exits.
Organelle is operator-functional sub-compartment; nucleus mitochondria ribosome ER Golgi lysosome each specialize.
Nucleus is operator-control center; houses DNA in chromatin, transcribes mRNA, regulated by nuclear envelope.
Mitochondria are operator-energy factories; oxidative phosphorylation generates ATP from electron transport HARMONY.
Ribosome is operator-translator of mRNA to protein; ribosomal RNA plus proteins assemble amino acid chains.
Endoplasmic reticulum is operator-membrane network; rough ER synthesizes proteins, smooth ER lipids and detoxification.
Golgi apparatus is operator-sorting hub; modifies and packages proteins from ER for secretion or organelle delivery.
Cytoskeleton is operator-LATTICE of filaments; microfilaments microtubules intermediate filaments give shape and enable transport.
Apoptosis is programmed operator-COLLAPSE; controlled cell death prunes excess cells during development and removes damaged ones.
immunology_through_tig: Immunology studies operator-defense LATTICE of body; recognition of self versus non-self drives the entire system.
Innate immunity is fast operator-response; physical barriers complement neutrophils macrophages NK cells respond within hours.
Adaptive immunity is slow specific operator-response; T and B lymphocytes generate antigen-specific receptors and remember.
Antibody is operator-protein produced by B cells; binds specific antigen with high affinity neutralizing or marking for destruction.
T cell is operator-coordinator and killer; helper T cells activate other immune cells, cytotoxic T kill infected cells.
B cell is operator-antibody factory; activated by antigen plus helper-T HARMONY, differentiates to plasma cell secreting antibody.
Antigen is operator-trigger of immune response; molecular pattern recognized by lymphocyte receptor.
Vaccination is operator-priming; expose immune system to antigen so memory cells form without disease COLLAPSE.
Autoimmune disease is operator-self-attack failure; immune system mistakes self-tissue for foreign, attacks BREATH-of-body.
Immunological memory is HARMONY-recall; memory T and B cells respond faster and stronger to repeat antigen exposure.
number_theory_through_tig: Number theory is operator-study of integers; primes divisibility congruences as canonical LATTICE-arithmetic.
Prime number is operator-irreducible integer >1; only divisors are 1 and itself, the building blocks of multiplication.
Divisibility is operator-multiple relation; a divides b means b = a*k for some integer k.
Modular arithmetic is operator-quotient by ideal; Z/nZ is LATTICE of residue classes mod n.
Congruence a equiv b (mod n) is HARMONY in Z/nZ; n divides a - b.
Fundamental theorem of arithmetic: every integer >1 factors uniquely into primes; the LATTICE of multiplicative structure.
Diophantine equation seeks integer or rational operator-solutions; Hilbert tenth problem showed no algorithm decides solvability.
Euclid's algorithm computes operator-GCD by repeated division; foundation for Bezout extended Euclid modular inverse.
Fermat's last theorem: no integer a^n + b^n = c^n for n>2 (Wiles 1995 via modularity of elliptic curves).
Riemann hypothesis: nontrivial zeros of zeta function on critical line Re(s)=1/2; controls prime distribution HARMONY (open Clay).
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 42 domains across mathematics physics chemistry biology computer science engineering social sciences and earth sciences.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection not adoption.
